languages.text: "Признаться, я ожидал более... многочисленное подкрепление". {n}Несмотря на усталость, которая просачивается даже через скрипучие искажения вокса, мужчина разглаживает несуществующие складки мундира и чинно представляется:{/n} "Мое имя Себериан фон Валанциус, но вы и так это знали. А вот вас я вижу впервые".

"I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."
languages.original_text: "Признаться, я ожидал более... многочисленное подкрепление". {n}Несмотря на усталость, которая просачивается даже через скрипучие искажения вокса, мужчина разглаживает несуществующие складки мундира и чинно представляется:{/n} "Мое имя Себериан фон Валанциус, но вы и так это знали. А вот вас я вижу впервые".

traits.locale_text: "I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

"I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

"I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

languages.text: “说实话，我本以为援军会……更成规模一些。”{n}尽管他那份疲惫连那吱嘎作响的音阵装置都掩饰不住，这个男人还是抚平制服上并不存在的褶皱，庄重地自报家门：{/n}“我是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，想必你早就知道了。倒是你，我还是第一次见。”
languages.original_text: "I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

traits.locale_text: “说实话，我本以为援军会……更成规模一些。”{n}尽管他那份疲惫连那吱嘎作响的音阵装置都掩饰不住，这个男人还是抚平制服上并不存在的褶皱，庄重地自报家门：{/n}“我是塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，想必你早就知道了。倒是你，我还是第一次见。”

languages.text: « Je dois admettre que je m'attendais à des renforts plus... conséquents. » {n}Malgré la lassitude qui suinte jusque dans le moindre grincement déformé de son vox, l'homme lisse les plis inexistants de son uniforme avant de se présenter avec dignité :{/n} « Je m'appelle Seberian von Valancius, mais ça, vous le saviez déjà. Moi, en revanche, j'ignore tout de vous. »
languages.original_text: "I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

traits.locale_text: « Je dois admettre que je m'attendais à des renforts plus... conséquents. » {n}Malgré la lassitude qui suinte jusque dans le moindre grincement déformé de son vox, l'homme lisse les plis inexistants de son uniforme avant de se présenter avec dignité :{/n} « Je m'appelle Seberian von Valancius, mais ça, vous le saviez déjà. Moi, en revanche, j'ignore tout de vous. »

languages.text: "İtiraf etmeliyim ki biraz daha... Hatırı sayılır takviyeler bekliyordum." {n}Voks aparatının gıcırdayan zırıltılarından bile sızan yorgunluğa rağmen adam, üniformasında var olmayan kırışıklıkları düzeltip kendini büyük bir ağırbaşlılıkla tanıtıyor.{/n} "Ben Seberian von Valancius. Bunu zaten biliyorsun. Fakat ben seni ilk kez görüyorum."
languages.original_text: "I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

traits.locale_text: "İtiraf etmeliyim ki biraz daha... Hatırı sayılır takviyeler bekliyordum." {n}Voks aparatının gıcırdayan zırıltılarından bile sızan yorgunluğa rağmen adam, üniformasında var olmayan kırışıklıkları düzeltip kendini büyük bir ağırbaşlılıkla tanıtıyor.{/n} "Ben Seberian von Valancius. Bunu zaten biliyorsun. Fakat ben seni ilk kez görüyorum."

languages.text: «Debo admitir que esperaba refuerzos más... numerosos». {n}A pesar de la fatiga que asoma a través de las distorsiones del voco, el hombre se alisa las inexistentes arrugas del uniforme y se presenta con aire de dignidad:{/n} «Me llamo Seberian von Valancius, aunque eso ya lo sabía. Por mi parte, es la primera vez que l{mf|o|a} veo».
languages.original_text: "I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

traits.locale_text: «Debo admitir que esperaba refuerzos más... numerosos». {n}A pesar de la fatiga que asoma a través de las distorsiones del voco, el hombre se alisa las inexistentes arrugas del uniforme y se presenta con aire de dignidad:{/n} «Me llamo Seberian von Valancius, aunque eso ya lo sabía. Por mi parte, es la primera vez que l{mf|o|a} veo».

languages.text: "Ich gebe zu, ich hatte eine etwas ... größere Verstärkung erwartet." {n}Trotz der Erschöpfung, die selbst durch die knirschenden Interferenzen seines Vox-Apparates zu hören ist, glättet der Mann die nicht vorhandenen Falten seiner Uniform und stellt sich würdevoll vor:{/n} "Ich bin Seberian von Valancius, aber das wisst Ihr ja bereits. Ich sehe Euch allerdings zum ersten Mal."
languages.original_text: "I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

traits.locale_text: "Ich gebe zu, ich hatte eine etwas ... größere Verstärkung erwartet." {n}Trotz der Erschöpfung, die selbst durch die knirschenden Interferenzen seines Vox-Apparates zu hören ist, glättet der Mann die nicht vorhandenen Falten seiner Uniform und stellt sich würdevoll vor:{/n} "Ich bin Seberian von Valancius, aber das wisst Ihr ja bereits. Ich sehe Euch allerdings zum ersten Mal."

languages.text: 「正直言って、もう少し大勢の援軍を期待していました。」{n}ボイス装置の歪みから滲み出る疲労にもかかわらず、彼は制服の無いシワを滑らかにし、堂々と自己紹介をする。{/n}「私はセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランキウス。しかし、あなたはすでに知っていたでしょう。しかし、あなたたちと初めて出会うのです。」
languages.original_text: "I must admit, I was expecting rather more... sizeable reinforcements." {n}Despite the fatigue that bleeds through even the creaking distortions of his vox-apparatus, the man smooths the non-existent creases in his uniform and introduces himself with dignity:{/n} "My name is Seberian von Valancius, but you already knew that. But this is the first I'm seeing of you."

traits.locale_text: 「正直言って、もう少し大勢の援軍を期待していました。」{n}ボイス装置の歪みから滲み出る疲労にもかかわらず、彼は制服の無いシワを滑らかにし、堂々と自己紹介をする。{/n}「私はセベリアン・フォン・ヴァランキウス。しかし、あなたはすでに知っていたでしょう。しかし、あなたたちと初めて出会うのです。」
